I found your dentist appointment on your calendar:

- Title: Dentist Appointment  
- When: 2024-05-18, 09:00–10:00

What would you like me to do next?

Also, should I notify the dental clinic or anyone else when I reschedule? If yes, please provide the clinic email or confirm I should only update your calendar (the reschedule action will email the event participants).
